response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer, but the profile does not match this role's core requirements. His professional C++ exposure is limited to a brief 6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015 plus a thesis project — far short of the mandatory 5–10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows. His recent work centers on TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, and there is no Fixed Income, capital markets, or investment banking systems experience; RIDE Capital was a fintech product role, not capital-markets development. SQL experience appears to be MySQL/MongoDB rather than SQL Server or Oracle.
strengths: Solid low-latency/high-performance systems background (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic, DLang async I/O)
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing tooling authorship
Broad polyglot experience with quick adaptation across stacks and platforms
concerns: No substantial professional C++ experience, and none on the Windows platform recently
No Fixed Income, capital markets, or investment banking domain expertise
No stated SQL Server or Oracle experience (MySQL/MongoDB instead)

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
